   344→const MISSION_STATUS_LABELS: Record<string, { label: string; color: string }> = {

   349→  refuse: { label: 'Refusé', color: 'text-red-400 bg-red-500/10 border-red-500/20' },
   350→};
   351→
   352→const getScoreColor = (score: number) => {
   353→  if (score >= 70) return 'text-green-400';
   354→  if (score >= 50) return 'text-yellow-400';
   355→  if (score >= 30) return 'text-orange-400';
   356→  return 'text-red-400';
   357→};
   358→
   359→const Clients: React.FC<ClientsProps> = ({ onBack, onNavigate, user, directClientCount, maxClients }) => {
   360→  const [clients, setClients] = useState<Client[]>(ALL_INITIAL_CLIENTS);
   361→  const [selectedClient, setSelectedClient] = useState<Client | null>(null);
   362→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
   363→  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState('all');
   364→  const [sourceFilter, setSourceFilter] = useState<'all' | 'direct' | 'mission'>('all');
   365→  const [showNewClientModal, setShowNewClientModal] = useState(false);
   366→  const [showLimitAlert, setShowLimitAlert] = useState(false);
   367→
   368→  // Compteur de clients directs ajoutés manuellement (excluant les clients mission)
   369→  const addedDirectClients = useMemo(() => clients.filter(c => c.source === 'direct').length, [clients]);
   370→  const totalDirectCount = directClientCount + addedDirectClients - DIRECT_CLIENTS.length; // nouveaux directs ajoutés cette session + ceux du mois
   371→  const isAtLimit = totalDirectCount >= maxClients && user?.plan !== 'enterprise';
   372→  const planLabel = user?.plan === 'free' ? 'Starter' : user?.plan === 'pro' ? 'Pro' : 'Agency';
   373→
   374→  // New client form state
   375→  const [newClient, setNewClient] = useState({
   376→    companyName: '',
   377→    contactName: '',
   378→    email: '',
   379→    phone: '',
   380→    role: '',
   381→    plan: 'Starter' as 'Starter' | 'Pro' | 'Agency',
   382→    address: '',
   383→    siret: '',
   384→    vatNumber: '',
   385→  });
   386→
   387→  const filteredClients = useMemo(() => {
   388→    return clients.filter(client => {
   389→      const matchesSearch = client.companyName.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   390→                            client.contactName.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   391→                            client.email.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
   392→      const matchesStatus = statusFilter === 'all' || client.status === statusFilter;
   393→      const matchesSource = sourceFilter === 'all' || client.source === sourceFilter;
   394→      return matchesSearch && matchesStatus && matchesSource;
   395→    });
   396→  }, [clients, searchTerm, statusFilter, sourceFilter]);
   397→
   398→  const totalMRR = useMemo(() => clients.reduce((acc, curr) => curr.status === 'active' ? acc + curr.mrr : acc, 0), [clients]);
   399→  const activeCount = useMemo(() => clients.filter(c => c.status === 'active').length, [clients]);
   400→  const missionClientCount = useMemo(() => clients.filter(c => c.source === 'mission').length, [clients]);
   401→
   402→  // --- EXPORT CSV ---
   403→  const handleExportCSV = () => {
   404→    const headers = [
   405→      'ID', 'Entreprise', 'Contact', 'Rôle', 'Email', 'Téléphone',
   406→      'Statut', 'Plan', 'MRR (€)', 'Source', 'Date création',
   407→      'Cycle facturation', 'Méthode paiement', 'SLA',
   408→      'Adresse', 'SIRET', 'TVA', 'Pays',
   409→      'Mission ID', 'URL analysée', 'Score AEO', 'Budget mission (€)', 'Statut mission', 'Deadline mission'
   410→    ];
   411→
   412→    const rows = filteredClients.map(c => [
   413→      c.id,
   414→      c.companyName,
   415→      c.contactName,
   416→      c.role,
   417→      c.email,
   418→      c.phone,
   419→      c.status,
   420→      c.plan,
   421→      c.mrr,
   422→      c.source,
   423→      c.createdAt,
   424→      c.contract.billingCycle,
   425→      c.contract.paymentMethod,
   426→      c.contract.slaLevel,
   427→      c.legal.address,
   428→      c.legal.siret,
   429→      c.legal.vatNumber,
   430→      c.legal.country,
   431→      c.mission?.missionId || '',
   432→      c.mission?.analyzedUrl || '',
   433→      c.mission?.aeoScore || '',
   434→      c.mission?.budget || '',
   435→      c.mission?.missionStatus || '',
   436→      c.mission?.deadline || '',
   437→    ]);
   438→
   439→    const csvContent = [
   440→      headers.join(';'),
   441→      ...rows.map(row => row.map(cell => `"${String(cell).replace(/"/g, '""')}"`).join(';'))
   442→    ].join('\n');
   443→
   444→    // BOM for Excel UTF-8 compatibility
   445→    const blob = new Blob(['\uFEFF' + csvContent], { type: 'text/csv;charset=utf-8;' });
   446→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
   447→    const link = document.createElement('a');
   448→    link.href = url;
   449→    link.download = `citedby-clients-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)}.csv`;

## **SUMMARY OF FINDINGS**

### Critical Issues Found:
1. **NO createPortal usage** - All modals render inline, which could be problematic for z-index and stacking context
2. **NO scroll locking** - When modals appear, body can still scroll, creating poor UX
3. **AiMonitoring loading modal** (lines 651-659) - Has NO height constraints, could overflow if content changes

### Positive Patterns:
- Most modals use `max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto` for proper scroll handling
- Backdrop overlays use `fixed inset-0 ... bg-black/70 backdrop-blur-sm` consistently
- Modal containers use `relative ... z-50` or `z-[9999]` for stacking
- Sticky headers/footers in multi-section modals (Clients modal pattern)

### Recommended Fixes:
1. Implement `createPortal` for all modals (portal to document.body)
2. Add body scroll lock when any modal is open
3. Add height constraints to AiMonitoring.tsx loading modal
4. Consider creating a reusable Modal wrapper component with built-in scroll lock and proper z-index handling
